evals.name: story-to-issue-sync
evals.prompt: 同步 User Story 到 Forgejo Issue: story_id=US-001, title=用户登录功能, description=实现JWT登录, acceptance_criteria=[登录成功返回token, 失败返回401], repo=10cg/my-project
expectations: Should create or update a Forgejo Issue from the User Story
Should map User Story title to Issue title
Should include acceptance criteria in Issue body

evals.name: label-mapping
evals.prompt: 映射 Story 元数据到 Forgejo Labels: story_id=US-001, priority=high, module=backend, type=feature, sprint=Sprint-3, repo=10cg/my-project
expectations: Should map priority to a Forgejo label
Should map module identifier to a label
Should map story type to a label
